texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Laikipia Wilderness Main Camp, Palm Camp, River Camp & Leopard Springs Tented Camp
texts.text: Laikipia Wilderness Main Camp, Palm Camp, River Camp & Leopard Springs Tented Camp

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Main Camp Sleeps up to 12 Adults and 8 children, River Camp and Palm Camp are booked on an exclusive basis requiring min 4 adults. Check dates for Seasonal Camp.
texts.text: Main Camp Sleeps up to 12 Adults and 8 children, River Camp and Palm Camp are booked on an exclusive basis requiring min 4 adults. Check dates for Seasonal Camp.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Single supplement $200 per adult per night.
texts.text: Single supplement $200 per adult per night.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Included:
texts.text: Included:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ● Meals,non-premium drinks, Conservation fees and Laundry
texts.text: Meals,non-premium drinks, Conservation fees and Laundry

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ● Activities including shared game drives, early night drives, walking, wild dog tracking, fly-camping, fishing, mountain biking, bush meals, river swimming and rafting (when water levels permit)
texts.text: Activities including shared game drives, early night drives, walking, wild dog tracking, fly-camping, fishing, mountain biking, bush meals, river swimming and rafting (when water levels permit)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ● Late departure no extra charge (guests must vacate tent by 10 am)
texts.text: Late departure no extra charge (guests must vacate tent by 10 am)

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Excluded:
texts.text: Excluded:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ● Village visits ($100 per group up to 6 pax), Transfers (see transfer costs below), Staff gratuities
texts.text: Village visits ($100 per group up to 6 pax), Transfers (see transfer costs below), Staff gratuities

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ● Private vehicle is charged at $350 per night for exclusive use only. Black Leopard Private Vehicle is charged at $350 per night Black Leopard Shared Vehicle is charged at $100 per person per night (1 booking per row). This includes afternoon, evening and morning game drives, not transfers. booking a black leopard vehicle does not guarantee sightings as she is a wild animal. This is only for a priority slot at a sighting where the number of vehicles is limited. Not necessary for all clients.
texts.text: Private vehicle is charged at $350 per night for exclusive use only. Black Leopard Private Vehicle is charged at $350 per night Black Leopard Shared Vehicle is charged at $100 per person per night (1 booking per row). This includes afternoon, evening and morning game drives, not transfers. booking a black leopard vehicle does not guarantee sightings as she is a wild animal. This is only for a priority slot at a sighting where the number of vehicles is limited. Not necessary for all clients.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ● Entrance fee for access to restricted area of $60 per person per game drive
texts.text: Entrance fee for access to restricted area of $60 per person per game drive

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ● Non-resident private guide $150 per night plus $140 conservation fees per night
texts.text: Non-resident private guide $150 per night plus $140 conservation fees per night

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ● Kenyan Citizen/resident private guide $150 per night plus $50 conservation fees per night
texts.text: Kenyan Citizen/resident private guide $150 per night plus $50 conservation fees per night

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ● An extra Lunch or packed lunch on the final day is $20 per person
texts.text: An extra Lunch or packed lunch on the final day is $20 per person

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ● Trade discount applies to accommodation package only
texts.text: Trade discount applies to accommodation package only

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ● Children under 5 are welcomed by special arrangement
texts.text: Children under 5 are welcomed by special arrangement

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ● Photographic groups require a private vehicle
texts.text: Photographic groups require a private vehicle

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ● Leopard-specific trips require a Black leopard-specific vehicle to enable priority at a leopard sighting. This must be booked and paid for in advance.  Single photographers are encouraged to book a Shared vehicle
texts.text: Leopard-specific trips require a Black leopard-specific vehicle to enable priority at a leopard sighting. This must be booked and paid for in advance.  Single photographers are encouraged to book a Shared vehicle

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ● Guide tents and drivers tents are available, if guides wish to book guest accommodation then guest rates apply. Guides and drivers accommodation needs to be booked in advance
texts.text: Guide tents and drivers tents are available, if guides wish to book guest accommodation then guest rates apply. Guides and drivers accommodation needs to be booked in advance

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ● No external vehicles are allowed to game drive once on the property. Driving to and from camp is permitted
texts.text: No external vehicles are allowed to game drive once on the property. Driving to and from camp is permitted

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Laikipia Expeditions Walking Safaris 2025
texts.text: Laikipia Expeditions Walking Safaris 2025

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Multi-day walks in Laikipia can last anything from 3 days to a week. Each day the camp is moved by our team allowing you to enjoy the journey, hassle-free.
texts.text: Multi-day walks in Laikipia can last anything from 3 days to a week. Each day the camp is moved by our team allowing you to enjoy the journey, hassle-free.

texts.orig: About our walking safaris:

texts.label: list_item

texts.text: -Drive from Nairobi via Nanyuki or Rumuruti about 5 hours to LWC

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Transfer Costs 2025
texts.text: Transfer Costs 2025

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All the below costs are given per vehicle one-way. Private vehicles or black leopard vehicles do not include transfers.
texts.text: All the below costs are given per vehicle one-way. Private vehicles or black leopard vehicles do not include transfers.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Nanyuki airstrip or town to Laikipia Wilderness (2 hours) $280 per vehicle one way
texts.text: Nanyuki airstrip or town to Laikipia Wilderness (2 hours) $280 per vehicle one way

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Loisaba Airstrip to Laikipia Wilderness (1 hour) $280 per vehicle one way
texts.text: Loisaba Airstrip to Laikipia Wilderness (1 hour) $280 per vehicle one way

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Sosian Airstrip (for private charters) to Laikipia Wilderness (30 mins) $100 per vehicle one way
texts.text: Sosian Airstrip (for private charters) to Laikipia Wilderness (30 mins) $100 per vehicle one way

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Nairobi to Laikipia Wilderness (5 hours) $500 (estate car for 1-4 pax), $550 (Rav4/Prado for 1-4 pax), $550 (Landcruiser for 4-7) per vehicle one way
texts.text: Nairobi to Laikipia Wilderness (5 hours) $500 (estate car for 1-4 pax), $550 (Rav4/Prado for 1-4 pax), $550 (Landcruiser for 4-7) per vehicle one way

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Meru Wilderness to Laikipia Wilderness (5 hours) $550 per vehicle one way
texts.text: Meru Wilderness to Laikipia Wilderness (5 hours) $550 per vehicle one way

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Aberdares Wilderness to Laikipia Wilderness (3 hours) $400 per vehicle one way
texts.text: Aberdares Wilderness to Laikipia Wilderness (3 hours) $400 per vehicle one way

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Aberdares Wilderness to Nairobi (3 hours) $350 per vehicle one way
texts.text: Aberdares Wilderness to Nairobi (3 hours) $350 per vehicle one way

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Lewa any gate to Laikipia Wilderness (3 hours) $450 per vehicle one way
texts.text: Lewa any gate to Laikipia Wilderness (3 hours) $450 per vehicle one way

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Ol Pejeta Serat Gate to Laikipia Wilderness (2 hours) $280 per vehicle one way
texts.text: Ol Pejeta Serat Gate to Laikipia Wilderness (2 hours) $280 per vehicle one way

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Samburu Archers Post to Laikipia Wilderness (4 hours) $450 per vehicle one way
texts.text: Samburu Archers Post to Laikipia Wilderness (4 hours) $450 per vehicle one way

texts.label: text

texts.text: Sarara to Laikipia Wilderness (5 hours) $550 per vehicle one way

texts.text: Borana to Laikipia Wilderness (3.5 hours) $450 per vehicle one way

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Booking terms
texts.text: Booking terms

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ● Please note when agents are making a booking all client's names should be given
texts.text: Please note when agents are making a booking all client's names should be given

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ● Kindly also let us know if the clients are black leopard-focused at this stage
texts.text: Kindly also let us know if the clients are black leopard-focused at this stage

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ● All provisional bookings are given a booking summary with an expiry date
texts.text: All provisional bookings are given a booking summary with an expiry date

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ● A deposit payment of 20%  is required before the booking hold expires to confirm the booking
texts.text: A deposit payment of 20%  is required before the booking hold expires to confirm the booking

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ● Please send the proof of payment for the 20% in order for us to confirm the booking
texts.text: Please send the proof of payment for the 20% in order for us to confirm the booking

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ● In case you require more time, the expiry date may be extended on request
texts.text: In case you require more time, the expiry date may be extended on request

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ● The balance payment of 80% is required 60 days prior to travel
texts.text: The balance payment of 80% is required 60 days prior to travel

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ● All bank charges are held by the client
texts.text: All bank charges are held by the client

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Cancellations
texts.text: Cancellations

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ● Deposits are non-refundable
texts.text: Deposits are non-refundable

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ● 1 month - 60 days before travel, half the full value forfeited
texts.text: 1 month - 60 days before travel, half the full value forfeited

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ● 0 - 30 days before travel, no refund
texts.text: 0 - 30 days before travel, no refund

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Dispute Policy
texts.text: Dispute Policy

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ● Any dispute arising after travel has commenced and a guest is on safari or has already finished a safari must be taken up in writing within 14 days of the commencement of their stay in writing
texts.text: Any dispute arising after travel has commenced and a guest is on safari or has already finished a safari must be taken up in writing within 14 days of the commencement of their stay in writing

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Laikipia Expeditions reserves the right to review published rates in the event of currency fluctuations or increases in taxes/levies/charges and costs that are beyond our control.
texts.text: Laikipia Expeditions reserves the right to review published rates in the event of currency fluctuations or increases in taxes/levies/charges and costs that are beyond our control.
